pi_items.source: Cross-verified from: task.json description ('save the modified project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/my_turbine.wpa'), export_result.sh line 10 (PROJECT_FILE="/home/ga/Documents/projects/my_turbine.wpa"), and verifier.py lines 33-38 (checks for my_turbine.wpa)

privileged_info_summary: The task 'load_sample_project@1' requires an agent to load a QBlade v0.96.2 sample project (.wpa file format), modify it by adding a NACA 0015 airfoil using the Airfoil Design module, and save the result as 'my_turbine.wpa' in /home/ga/Documents/projects/. QBlade is an open-source wind turbine simulation software available on SourceForge. The NACA 0015 is a real symmetric airfoil with 15% thickness ratio. The sample projects are real QBlade project files bundled with the software distribution. The expected output filename is 'my_turbine.wpa'. The task uses sparse reward with a 240-second timeout and maximum 35 steps.
